name: Three Onion Pie with Feta Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 Large leeks, white parts separated and cleaned
2 Large Leeks, white parts separated and cleaned
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the safflower oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped yellow and red onions to the skillet. Sauté over moderate heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the onions are golden brown.
3. Stir in the dry white wine, then add the quartered red onion pieces and cleaned leek whites. Continue sautéing another 15 minutes, stirring frequently, or until the mixture is fragrant and the onions are tender and caramelized.
4. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. In a mixing bowl, combine beaten eggs with about two tablespoons of the chopped parsley, dill (or dried dill), tarragon, crumbled feta cheese, and pepper.
7. Stir in the cooled onion mixture from the skillet.
8. Oil a 10-inch tart pan. Generously sprinkle the bottom with dry bread crumbs.
9. Pour the egg mixture into the prepared pan, adding the sautéed onions on top.
10. Place the thinly sliced plum tomato around the outer edge of the pie.
11. Sprinkle remaining parsley over the center of the pie.
12. Scatter a light layer of dry bread crumbs evenly over the entire surface.
13. Bake in the preheated oven for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the filling is set and the top is golden brown.
14. Allow the pie to cool for 5 to 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
